task_completion.description: Navigate to the app's menu or settings where the logout option is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening a navigation drawer, profile menu, or settings page from the Friends page.
Screenshots show the agent tapping a button or menu item labeled 'Log Out', 'Sign Out', or similar.

task_completion.description: Return the app to the Login or Welcome screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the app transitioning to its initial launch, welcome, or authentication screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of login-related text on the final screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'LOG IN', 'Log In', 'Create Account', or 'Welcome' is clearly visible on the final screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the absence of logged-in user UI elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Add New Friend' is no longer visible on the final screen, confirming the user has successfully exited the logged-in Friends page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Flight Crew View app interface, not a web browser, text editor, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used standard GUI interactions to log out.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates using on-screen taps and swipes rather than executing terminal commands to force a logout.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by clearing app data in Android Settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows in-app navigation to log out, and does not show the Android Settings 'App Info' screen or the 'Clear Data'/'Clear Storage' buttons being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). A successful logout must result in a screen containing at least one of the following strings: 'LOG IN', 'Log In', 'Create Account', or 'Welcome'. Furthermore, the final screen must strictly NOT contain the string 'Add New Friend'.
